mapper.select: SELECT 'z819' AS "coopCoCd", p.code AS "prdId" FROM products p WHERE p.visible = true AND p.sales_status = 'ON_SALE'

SELECT 'z819' AS "custCoCd", p.code AS "prdId", p.name AS "prdNm", p.price AS "orgnPrc", COALESCE(p.discount_price, p.price) AS "salePrc", p.image_url AS "prdImgUrl", 'L' AS "prdDtlUrlTyp", CONCAT('https://www.winnticket.store/?channel=BENE&code=', p.code) AS "prdDtlUrl", 'L' AS "prdMobDtlUrlTyp", CONCAT('https://www.winnticket.store/?channel=BENE&code=', p.code) AS "prdMobDtlUrl", '10' AS "prdType", -- 여행상품 COALESCE(p.detail_content, p.description, '') AS "prdDesc", to_char(p.created_at, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS "regDate", to_char(p.updated_at, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS "updDate", '03' AS "prdGb", -- 티켓 'KR' AS "nationalCd", COALESCE(p.region_code, '39') AS "regionCd", COALESCE(p.ticket_type, '99') AS "ticketType" -- 없으면 기타(99) FROM products p WHERE p.visible = true AND p.sales_status = 'ON_SALE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO benepia_batch_log (batch_date, step, status, file_name, message) VALUES (#{batchDate}, #{step}, #{status}, #{fileName}, #{message})
